title: Add new Express route for user ID
description: Create a new endpoint (e.g., GET /api/user-id) in the Express server that will be used to retrieve the user ID.

title: Implement route handler logic
description: In the route handler, construct a hard‑coded user ID value (e.g., a static string or number) and return it in a JSON response along with a success status.

title: Return response format
description: Ensure the JSON response includes both the user ID and a status field (e.g., {"status": "success", "userId": "12345"}).

title: Write unit test for user ID route
description: Add a test that calls the new route, verifies that it responds with a 200 status, and checks that the response JSON contains the expected keys and a valid user ID string.
